caption: A person's hands are seen handling several basketball trading cards encased in clear plastic protectors against a red and white background. In the initial sequence, the hands hold and shift a set of holographic cards, revealing players in white and dark jerseys. The background features a logo and the text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". A small inset window in the background shows a man wearing a black hoodie sitting in a room with shelves and equipment. As the sequence progresses, the hands move the cards, transitioning from a focus on a player in a white jersey to a card featuring a player in a red jersey. The movement is fluid, shifting the cards to showcase different players while the "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" branding remains visible in the background.
